ingredients.i1_desc: A bag of premium flour radiating golden light, the soulful foundation of the pizza.
ingredients.i2_desc: A rare tomato said to instantly fill the sauce with aroma.
ingredients.i3_desc: Cool spring water blessed by a Tiramisu master.
ingredients.i4_desc: Solid flavor, salty and rich, checking the soul of the pizza.
ingredients.i5_desc: That final touch of fragrance that evolves the ultimate pizza.

tasks.level2: Level 2: Where are the Dance Shoes?
tasks.level5: Level 5: Despair of the Desert and Disconnection
tasks.level6: Level 6: Beware of the Rampaging Gorilla

meta.antennaDesc: Contains half of the comms passcode: {{passCode}}
meta.fullscreenHint: Fullscreen recommended for best experience (Click to trigger)
meta.noIngredients: No collected ingredients yet. Please visit levels to get ingredients.
meta.invalidQr: Invalid QR Code, please rescan the correct level.

synthesis.title: Synthesis Collab Station
synthesis.subtitle: Only showing the ingredients your team has, collect all 5 to synthesize!
synthesis.loading: Checking your team's ingredients and collaborating teams...
synthesis.allyFound: Ally found! Please collaborate with <1>{{team}}</1>, they can provide: {{ingredients}}
synthesis.rescueInitiated: Rescue initiated! Go find <1>{{team}}</1>, they have extra ingredients to help you finish the pizza.
synthesis.globalMissing: Global Collaboration Tip: It looks like everyone is missing {{missing}}, please report to the GM to start global collab.
synthesis.completeDesc: All 5 ingredients processed, proceed to the final challenge!

result.villainQuote: Can't even solve this? Absolutely lack of Sigma energy!

victory.downloadAlert: Save certificate feature is under construction... imagine a really cool Pizza Master Certificate saved in your phone! 📸
victory.subtitle: The peace of the campus has been defended!

intro.level1_text: Cappu-cappu! I am Cappuccino in the shadows! Burger Villain used illusion to make me forget the hand seals for my ninjutsu! Without ninjutsu, I can't give you pizza ingredients, that's not Sigma at all!
intro.level2_text: Mi mi mi mi! I'm so mad! Someone hid my favorite ballet shoes! Without dance shoes, how am I going to dance for Lololo? Help me find them!
intro.level3_text: Help... there's a blue frog named Slim croaking non-stop on my golden hat! Master Tiramisu said I need a 'Super Inflatable Balloon' to blow it away like a balloon. Can you help me?
intro.level4_text: Hehehe! I'm Bombardilo Crocodilo! Today I don't toss bombs, I toss water balloons! Since you think you're smart, try solving my invincible logic puzzle! Get it wrong and you'll be drenched, super fierce!
intro.level5_text: I'm dying of thirst... worse than no water is no Wi-Fi. Burger Villain locked my time clock with a 'pattern password'. Can you help me crack the sequence and restart the clock?
intro.level6_text: I want to become a wooden gorilla too, to fight against Burger Villain, but I don't have enough strength alone. Will you join me?
intro.level7_text: The villain stepped on my brand new limited edition trendy shoes! I'll beat him up! But he set up a dual-color energy shield, I can't win solo, go find differently colored allies to help!

reset.clearFailed: Clear failed, please try again later.
reset.maintenanceOnly: System maintenance only. Do not provide to general users.

level1.title: Ninja's Training
level1.desc:
Help Cappuccino Ninja arrange the correct hand seal sequence!
Hint numbers are hidden around the campus.
level1.clue: 💡 Clue: 'The Water Balloon Crocodile knows where the cheese is.'
level1.failMsg: Wrong sequence, Cappuccino Ninja told you to calm down!
level1.cooldownMsg: You just failed, this level is temporarily locked.

level2.title: Dance Shoe Safe
level2.desc: The culprit left a clue: the dance shoes are hidden 'at the intersection of three red plants and two benches', the passcode is there!
level2.clue: 💡 Clue: 'I heard Bigfoot Monkey has a frog on its head.'
level2.failMsg: This is not the passcode for the dance shoes! Go find clues and come back.
level2.cooldownMsg: This level cannot be retried currently, please explore elsewhere first.

level3.title: Inflate the Balloon!
level3.desc: Tap the balloon 50 times in 10 seconds!!!
level3.clue: 💡 Clue: 'Collect all five ingredients first, then process them together at the synthesizer!'
level3.failMsg: The frog is still croaking in the hat, Patapim is super mad!
level3.cooldownMsg: You just failed this level, go help collect materials in other levels first.

level4.title: Water Balloon Logic
level4.logic1: <blue>Blue balloon</blue> is not the heaviest, nor the lightest.
level4.logic3: <yellow>Yellow balloon</yellow> is lighter than <blue>Blue balloon</blue>, but it is 'NOT' the lightest.
level4.logicQuestion: What is the correct order from heaviest to lightest?
level4.clue: 💡 Clue: 'The elephant cactus got lost in the desert because there is no Wi-Fi.'
level4.failTitle: Hit by Water Balloon, Cooling Down
level4.failMsg: Wrong order! Bombardilo Crocodilo laughs and throws a giant water balloon at you!
level4.cooldownMsg: This level cannot be retried temporarily, go help other characters solve puzzles first.

level5.title: Desert Clock Crisis
level5.logicDesc1: Times shown on the first four locks:
level5.logicDesc2: What time should be entered for the 'fifth lock' to completely unlock it?
level5.clue: You obtained half of the communication password and a blue antenna fragment!
level5.failMsg: The clock beeped and locked! Please try again later.
level5.cooldownMsg: You just gave a wrong answer, please explore other levels first.

level6.errorNoAuth: Has not acquired login identity, please try again later.
level6.errorUploadFailed: Image upload failed, please try again later.
level6.title: Gorilla Strength Certification
level6.desc: Please have the whole team strike a super fierce 'gorilla chest thumping' pose, take a photo and upload it!
level6.successMsg:
Tung Tung Sahur is very satisfied with your strength!
You obtained ingredient collection hints!
level6.keyDesc:
Please continue to collect: Flour, Water, Holy Tomato, Parmesan Cheese, Magic Basil Leaf
Return to the Synthesis Room to process them together
level6.antennaGot: You obtained half of the communication password ({{passCode}}) and a {{color}} antenna fragment!
level6.failMsg: No valid photo uploaded yet, Tung Tung Sahur thinks you are not ready.
level6.cooldownMsg: This level is temporarily locked, please complete tasks in other levels first.

level7.noAntennaMsg: You don't have the antenna fragment yet! You must complete previous levels to find the fragment before communicating.
level7.title: Trendy Shoe Defense (Co-op)
level7.rule1: 1. Please find an allied team that has the <bold>{{color}} Antenna</bold>
level7.rule3: 3. Exchange intel and form the complete 6 digits!
level7.successMsg1: Lala Shark successfully beat up the boss!
level7.successMsg2:
Obtained full Wi-Fi access!
Quickly head to the 'Synthesis Room' to process the materials!
level7.failMsg: The shield is still solid! Please confirm with the allied team if the passcode order is correct.
level7.cooldownMsg: This level is temporarily locked, go find other teams to exchange intel first.

qrcode.errScannerNotReady: Scanner area is not established yet, please try again.
qrcode.errHttpsRequired: Camera function requires a secure connection, please use HTTPS or localhost to open the page.
qrcode.errBrowserNotSupported: Current browser does not support camera access, please use the latest version of Chrome or Safari.
qrcode.errPermissionDenied: Camera permission has been blocked, please go to browser settings to allow camera access.
qrcode.errCameraFailed: Cannot open camera, please check camera permissions.
qrcode.title: Scan QR Code
qrcode.instruction: Please align the QR Code within the frame, the system will recognize it automatically.

dnd.instruction: Drag to a slot to place; click to quickly put into an empty slot
